Appearances:
Plaintiff, Tenderloin Neighborhood Development is present. Represented by Mary Gillespi.
Attorney, Michael Rossoff, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, James Sheffiled , is present.
Attorney, Hope Greenhill , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem C. Zadik Shaprio, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of SEP-07-2010 is vacated.
